title: Humboltia polyliria
uses: Humboltia polyliria has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been studied for their ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a possible treatment for infections. In addition, its anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce pain and swelling in the body. The plant has also been used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential benefits of Humboltia polyliria.

Humboldtia polyliria is specifically classified in the genus Humboldtia, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The genus is part of the subfamily Rauvoloideae, which includes vines and shrubs with milky sap. This classification helps to identify and understand the evolutionary relationships within the Apocynaceae family.
